message:
feat(scheduler): add hugepage-backed allocation tracking and latency proxy telemetry

Add `hugepage_backed_allocs` counter to `NumaSlabPool` that increments
on every successful allocation when hugepages are active, regardless of
whether the allocation is local or cross-node. Surface this in telemetry
JSON as `hugepage_backed_allocs` with a `hugepage_hit_rate_bps` ratio
(basis points against total allocations).

Expand `NumaSlabTelemetry::as_json()` with a new `latency_proxies_bps`
object containing three memory-subsystem pressure indicators:
- `tlb_miss_pressure`: cross-node allocation ratio (proxy for TLB thrash)
- `cache_miss_pressure`: high-water-mark vs capacity ratio
- `occupancy_pressure`: current in-use vs capacity ratio

Add test `numa_slab_pool_tracks_hugepage_hit_rate_when_active` verifying
that hugepage-backed allocations are counted and reported correctly when
the hugepage subsystem is active, and extend the existing telemetry test
to assert the new JSON fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
